### exercise {.smaller}

<!-- adapted from 2025 spring final -->

```
struct Process {
    long is_active;
    ...
}
struct Process processes[16384];
long GetParentProcessUser(long process_id) {
    if (process_id >= 0 && process_id < 16384) {
        struct Process *this_process;
        this_process = &processes[process_id];
        if (this_process->is_active) {
            struct *parent_process;
            parent_process = &processes[this_process->parent_process_id];
            return parent_process->user_id;
        } else {
            return -1;
        }
    }
}
```
*  exercise 1: where is cache access that is interesting for Spectre attack?
  <table style="font-size: 80%">
<tr><td>A. `&processes[process_id]`</td><td>B. `this_process->is_active`</td></tr>
<tr><td>C. `this_process->parent_process_id`</td><td>D. `&processes[this_process->parent_process_id]`</td></tr>
<tr><td>E. `parent_process->user_id`</td>
</table>
 

### exercise {.smaller}

<!-- adapted from 2025 spring final -->

```
struct Process {
    long is_active;
    ...
}
struct Process processes[16384];
long GetParentProcessUser(long process_id) {
    if (process_id >= 0 && process_id < 16384) {
        struct Process *this_process;
        this_process = &processes[process_id];
        if (this_process->is_active) {
            struct *parent_process;
            parent_process = &processes[this_process->parent_process_id];
            return parent_process->user_id;
        } else {
            return -1;
        }
    }
}
```
*  exercise 2: how to compute value for argument?
